channel.title: _jacobking TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from _jacobking

item.title: Caramelised onion butter beans 🧅 written recipe below 👇🏾 When it comes to the most comforting meals, it has to be simple and satisfying 🤝 well this dish starts with jammy, caramelised onion which deepens the flavours soaked up by the butter beans 😋 👇🏾ing
item.description: Caramelised onion butter beans 🧅 written recipe below 👇🏾 When it comes to the most comforting meals, it has to be simple and satisfying 🤝 well this dish starts with jammy, caramelised onion which deepens the flavours soaked up by the butter beans 😋 👇🏾ing

item.title: VEGAN EGGS FROM ASANTE IN BARCELONA 🇪🇸 I visited the loveliest cafe in Barcelona with classic sandwiches and sweet treats but also innovative dishes like their vegan eggs Benedict with a runny egg 😮 Everything is made in house and with love, so if you’r
item.description: VEGAN EGGS FROM ASANTE IN BARCELONA 🇪🇸 I visited the loveliest cafe in Barcelona with classic sandwiches and sweet treats but also innovative dishes like their vegan eggs Benedict with a runny egg 😮 Everything is made in house and with love, so if you’r

item.title: BAKED BLACK BEAN TACOS 🌮 written recipe below 👇🏾 Everyone should be eating way more beans because they’re full of fibre, protein and proper cheap too 😮 Here is a super simple, healthy and speedy way to turn black beans into beautifuly baked crispy tacos
item.description: BAKED BLACK BEAN TACOS 🌮 written recipe below 👇🏾 Everyone should be eating way more beans because they’re full of fibre, protein and proper cheap too 😮 Here is a super simple, healthy and speedy way to turn black beans into beautifuly baked crispy tacos

item.title: CORN BEANS, GREENS + BBQ TOFU 🌽 written recipe below 👇🏾 Who knows what’s healthy anymore? People are saying your takeaway treat and protein bar after the gym aren’t! Yes, you shouldn’t be relying on those things as your main source of energy but as part o

item.title: Everything I ate as a #vegan flying with @Emirates 🇹🇭 #food #travel #flying #thailand
item.description: Everything I ate as a #vegan flying with @Emirates 🇹🇭 #food #travel #flying #thailand

item.title: Tasty Tofu Pudding in Bangkok at Hai Maks Tofu Pudding + Jelly 🇹🇭 We tried his Tofu pudding in a sweet + spiced ginger tea with crispy sesame bread sticks but he also had a jelly dessert that we didn't get to try! This was an absolute delight for the se
item.description: Tasty Tofu Pudding in Bangkok at Hai Maks Tofu Pudding + Jelly 🇹🇭 We tried his Tofu pudding in a sweet + spiced ginger tea with crispy sesame bread sticks but he also had a jelly dessert that we didn't get to try! This was an absolute delight for the se

item.title: 9 Emperor Gods Festival (vegetarian festival) 🇹🇭 For 9 days during the 9th month of the lunar calendar, Buddhists across Thailand abstain from eating meat, smoking and other unhealthy vices which results in an amazing vegan food festival 😮 They veganise
item.description: 9 Emperor Gods Festival (vegetarian festival) 🇹🇭 For 9 days during the 9th month of the lunar calendar, Buddhists across Thailand abstain from eating meat, smoking and other unhealthy vices which results in an amazing vegan food festival 😮 They veganise

item.title: 🚨 emergency 15 minute dumpling soup 🚨 written recipe below 👇🏾 Life gets busy sometime and it’s difficult to be cooking meals with loads of steps or ingredients but you obviously still want to eat good 😋 That’s were simple, minimal ingredient recipes lik
item.description: 🚨 emergency 15 minute dumpling soup 🚨 written recipe below 👇🏾 Life gets busy sometime and it’s difficult to be cooking meals with loads of steps or ingredients but you obviously still want to eat good 😋 That’s were simple, minimal ingredient recipes lik

item.title: HEALTHY SWEET POTATO BROWNIE 🍠 written recipe below 👇🏾 With so much unhealthy, processed foods filling up our supermarket shelves we need to take more control over what goes into our bodies 🤝 So every now and then when I’m feeling snacking, I make health
item.description: HEALTHY SWEET POTATO BROWNIE 🍠 written recipe below 👇🏾 With so much unhealthy, processed foods filling up our supermarket shelves we need to take more control over what goes into our bodies 🤝 So every now and then when I’m feeling snacking, I make health

item.title: PEA FRITTERS 🫛 written recipe below 👇🏾 Even though the proteins in peas are easier to digest than meat, they’re cheap and high in fibre they do not get the love they deserve 🙏🏾 Here we’ve made a quick, healthy snack paired with a light dip makes for a p
item.description: PEA FRITTERS 🫛 written recipe below 👇🏾 Even though the proteins in peas are easier to digest than meat, they’re cheap and high in fibre they do not get the love they deserve 🙏🏾 Here we’ve made a quick, healthy snack paired with a light dip makes for a p

item.title: 🚨NEW @Kallø FLAVOUR🚨 ad Their NEW Sweet Chilli Veggie Cakes are ✨ sensational ✨ just like the rest of their range which I scran all the time, particularly the Beetroot + Balsamic Veggie Cakes 🤝 Find them now at @Waitrose & Partners @Ocado @Morrisons | Gr

item.title: GARLICKY DIP 🧄 written recipe below 👇🏾 Garlic is everyone’s favourite aromatic, it’s; deep, rich and when cooked slowly in olive oil it goes all soft and buttery, the perfect base of this delicious dip! 😋 👇🏾ingredients👇🏾 -around 30 to 40 cloves of garli
item.description: GARLICKY DIP 🧄 written recipe below 👇🏾 Garlic is everyone’s favourite aromatic, it’s; deep, rich and when cooked slowly in olive oil it goes all soft and buttery, the perfect base of this delicious dip! 😋 👇🏾ingredients👇🏾 -around 30 to 40 cloves of garli

item.title: CREAMY ONE POT MUSHROOM PASTA 🍝 written recipe below 👇🏾 You don’t need a long list of ingredients and a complicated recipe to make comforting meals, with; one pot, a handful of pantry staples and a few minutes (about 20) you can make something super satis

item.title: The most authentic vegan Chinese food in 🇬🇧 @TofuVeganlondon Flying in chefs from the regions the dishes originate from is the reason the food here is so authentic and one of the best places for Chinese food in London, vegan or not 🤝 Chinese mock meats
item.description: The most authentic vegan Chinese food in 🇬🇧 @TofuVeganlondon Flying in chefs from the regions the dishes originate from is the reason the food here is so authentic and one of the best places for Chinese food in London, vegan or not 🤝 Chinese mock meats

item.title: LEMON PEPPER POTATO POPS 🥔 written recipe below 👇🏾 Potatoes really are everyone’s favourite carb and they are best when crispy and golden 😋 here they have a gooey centre, with a crunchy/craggily shell! 😋 👇🏾ingredients👇🏾 -6 large white potato -1 tsp gar
item.description: LEMON PEPPER POTATO POPS 🥔 written recipe below 👇🏾 Potatoes really are everyone’s favourite carb and they are best when crispy and golden 😋 here they have a gooey centre, with a crunchy/craggily shell! 😋 👇🏾ingredients👇🏾 -6 large white potato -1 tsp gar

item.description: BLACK BEAN BOWL 🥣 written recipe below 👇🏾 Ultra processed foods are the current hot topic and although we should be mindful of their consumption, some have been using this to push a diet focused on eating more red meat, eggs + other animal products which

item.title: CRISPY SPROUT + POTATO SALAD 🥔 written recipe below 👇🏾 Some people really don’t like Brussel sprouts but when you smash them along with some potatoes and then bake them, they go SO CRUNCHY! Pair that with this light, creamy dressing and you’re in for a t
item.description: CRISPY SPROUT + POTATO SALAD 🥔 written recipe below 👇🏾 Some people really don’t like Brussel sprouts but when you smash them along with some potatoes and then bake them, they go SO CRUNCHY! Pair that with this light, creamy dressing and you’re in for a t

item.title: TOFU SKIN ROAST CHICKEN 🐔 written recipe below 👇🏾 I am always hearing how ‘there is no protein in plants’ well can somebody tell me why dried tofu skin actually has more protein than the most protein dense meat available; chicken 👀 With some dried varie
item.description: TOFU SKIN ROAST CHICKEN 🐔 written recipe below 👇🏾 I am always hearing how ‘there is no protein in plants’ well can somebody tell me why dried tofu skin actually has more protein than the most protein dense meat available; chicken 👀 With some dried varie

item.title: COCONUT HORCHATA 🇲🇽 written recipe below 👇🏾 I stopped drinking alcohol around 4 years ago and around this time every year, although I am tempted by the festivities and fun; I am always reminded of how grateful I am for removing alcohol from my life! My r
item.description: COCONUT HORCHATA 🇲🇽 written recipe below 👇🏾 I stopped drinking alcohol around 4 years ago and around this time every year, although I am tempted by the festivities and fun; I am always reminded of how grateful I am for removing alcohol from my life! My r

item.title: MY NEW RECIPE E-BOOK; real, good food IS OUT NOW! 😊 This is the cacio e pepe beans on page 14! 🫘 A bunch of wholesome, whole foods focused recipes that are as simple as they are delicious - my drive over the last 5 years has been to get people eating mo

item.title: CARROT FRITTERS 🥕 this recipe is on page 50 of my new cook book; real, good food which you can find the link for in my bio 😊 I really cannot stand bland, tasteless veggies and that’s why I filled my new book with loads of ways to make veggies taste amazi

item.title: Many people falsely claim that tofu is unhealthy for you whilst completely ignoring the peer reviewed, science back studies that prove the environmental and health benefits it provides when compared to meat 🤝🏾 Meat might have more protein but is linked t
item.description: Many people falsely claim that tofu is unhealthy for you whilst completely ignoring the peer reviewed, science back studies that prove the environmental and health benefits it provides when compared to meat 🤝🏾 Meat might have more protein but is linked t

item.title: The intense focus on protein is worrying, as the other important macronutrients are often over looked 😭 Our bodies need a mixtures of; carbs, fats, fibre and protein to function, they are as important as each other and you can easily consume enough of al
item.description: The intense focus on protein is worrying, as the other important macronutrients are often over looked 😭 Our bodies need a mixtures of; carbs, fats, fibre and protein to function, they are as important as each other and you can easily consume enough of al

item.title: Carbs are not ‘unhealthy’ and they don’t ’make you fat’, they’re the bodies primary source of energy so make sure you eat more legumes like these caramelised onion lentils which you can find in my book (link in bio) 🤝🏾 #recipe #lentils #healthy #carbs #c
item.description: Carbs are not ‘unhealthy’ and they don’t ’make you fat’, they’re the bodies primary source of energy so make sure you eat more legumes like these caramelised onion lentils which you can find in my book (link in bio) 🤝🏾 #recipe #lentils #healthy #carbs #c

item.title: baked black bean tacos, find the full recipe in my book (link in bio) ❤️ We seriously need to eat less animal products, the over bearing strain it is placing on the planet is to much to ignore; they’re destroying our rainforests, emptying our oceans and
item.description: baked black bean tacos, find the full recipe in my book (link in bio) ❤️ We seriously need to eat less animal products, the over bearing strain it is placing on the planet is to much to ignore; they’re destroying our rainforests, emptying our oceans and

item.title: More beans + tofu = more life + longevity, so try these bean/tofu mince chilli recipe from my book (link in bio) ❤️ #recipe #food #beans #healthy #cooking
item.description: More beans + tofu = more life + longevity, so try these bean/tofu mince chilli recipe from my book (link in bio) ❤️ #recipe #food #beans #healthy #cooking

item.title: Red meat and dairy are just as bad as ultra processed foods, instead of eating either, try; simple, satisfying whole foods recipes like this butternut squash daal which you can find in my book (link in bio) ❤️ #recipe #food #cooking #healthy #curry
item.description: Red meat and dairy are just as bad as ultra processed foods, instead of eating either, try; simple, satisfying whole foods recipes like this butternut squash daal which you can find in my book (link in bio) ❤️ #recipe #food #cooking #healthy #curry

item.title: PULL APART GARLIC BREAD 🧄 written recipe below 👇🏾 I adapted a recipe from @jessicainthekitchen for this one, I turned her ‘vegan Japanese milk bread’ into this tasty garlic bread here 👏 👇🏾INGREDIENTS👇🏾 -4 tbsp bread flour (30g) -1/2 cup soy milk (120ml)
item.description: PULL APART GARLIC BREAD 🧄 written recipe below 👇🏾 I adapted a recipe from @jessicainthekitchen for this one, I turned her ‘vegan Japanese milk bread’ into this tasty garlic bread here 👏 👇🏾INGREDIENTS👇🏾 -4 tbsp bread flour (30g) -1/2 cup soy milk (120ml)

item.title: (vg) FRIED CHICK’N 🐔 written recipe below 👇🏾 EPISODE 1 of ✨MAGIC MUSHROOMS✨ - enoki mushrooms 👽 You can find enoki online or at your local East Asian/World Food store! 👇🏾ingredients👇🏾 -enoki mushrooms -1 cup vegan chicken stock (oxo) -1 cup soy milk -ju
item.description: (vg) FRIED CHICK’N 🐔 written recipe below 👇🏾 EPISODE 1 of ✨MAGIC MUSHROOMS✨ - enoki mushrooms 👽 You can find enoki online or at your local East Asian/World Food store! 👇🏾ingredients👇🏾 -enoki mushrooms -1 cup vegan chicken stock (oxo) -1 cup soy milk -ju
